mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tiktok_reports ( advertiser_id, dimensions, dimension_id, stat_date, spend, impressions, clicks, ctr, cpc, cpm, conversions, conversion_rate, cost_per_conversion, conversion_value, roi ) VALUES ( #{advertiserId}, #{dimensions}, #{dimensionId}, #{statDate}, #{spend}, #{impressions}, #{clicks}, #{ctr}, #{cpc}, #{cpm}, #{conversions}, #{conversionRate}, #{costPerConversion}, #{conversionValue}, #{roi} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE spend = VALUES(spend), impressions = VALUES(impressions), clicks = VALUES(clicks), ctr = VALUES(ctr), cpc = VALUES(cpc), cpm = VALUES(cpm), conversions = VALUES(conversions), conversion_rate = VALUES(conversion_rate), cost_per_conversion = VALUES(cost_per_conversion), conversion_value = VALUES(conversion_value), roi = VALUES(roi), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tiktok_reports WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tiktok_reports ( advertiser_id, dimensions, dimension_id, stat_date, spend, impressions, clicks, ctr, cpc, cpm, conversions, conversion_rate, cost_per_conversion, conversion_value, roi ) VALUES
(#{item.advertiserId}, #{item.dimensions}, #{item.dimensionId}, #{item.statDate}, #{item.spend}, #{item.impressions}, #{item.clicks}, #{item.ctr}, #{item.cpc}, #{item.cpm}, #{item.conversions}, #{item.conversionRate}, #{item.costPerConversion}, #{item.conversionValue}, #{item.roi})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE spend = VALUES(spend), impressions = VALUES(impressions), clicks = VALUES(clicks), ctr = VALUES(ctr), cpc = VALUES(cpc), cpm = VALUES(cpm), conversions = VALUES(conversions), conversion_rate = VALUES(conversion_rate), cost_per_conversion = VALUES(cost_per_conversion), conversion_value = VALUES(conversion_value), roi = VALUES(roi), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
